name: [CC-05] Document continuation native boundary or add priority-collision coverage
description: CC-05 needs a deterministic priority-collision proof for continuation where a fresh recovery marker competes with server resume and overdue review targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a deterministic unit test proving a fresh SecureStore recovery marker wins when server resume target and overdue review target are also present. The test must render the recovery headline, Continue into /(app)/session with recovery params, clear the profile-scoped marker, and not navigate to server resume or relearn. Branches to cover or cite: fresh recovery plus resume plus overdue collision; stale recovery ignored; resume beats overdue; overdue-only fallback; parked native cold-start path. Expected files: apps/mobile/src/components/home/LearnerScreen.test.tsx, apps/mobile/src/lib/session-recovery.test.ts, resume-crash-recovery.yaml for the native boundary, and the flow docs. Keep/document the native cold-start E2E boundary, then update CC-05 with evidence and final status.
riskImpact: P0 V2 continuation coverage gap: home continuation priority can regress across recovery/resume/review targets without a single deterministic proof.
